title: depressed crystal pvp
description: Depressed Crystal PvP Pack [16x] Greyscale 16x pack for crystal PvP. FPS-boosted, minimal distractions, custom sounds, and a beautiful sky for full focus.
body:
🖤 Depressed Crystal PvP Pack | 16x | FPS Boost | Custom Sounds

Enter a world stripped of color with the Depressed Crystal PvP Pack — a 16x texture pack built for players who thrive in silence, focus, and emotional detachment. Designed in cold, desaturated greyscale tones, this pack offers a bleak but clean aesthetic tailored for competitive PvP environments.

🕳️ Features:

Desaturated Visuals: All textures are shaded in greyscale, creating a muted and somber atmosphere that enhances focus and reduces distractions.
Crystal PvP Optimized: Simplified textures improve hit clarity, crystal visibility, and response time in high-pressure moments.

FPS Friendly: Lightweight 16x resolution ensures smooth performance even on lower-end systems.

Custom Sounds: Subtle, muffled audio for hits, blocks, and crystal breaks — reinforcing the empty, echoing mood.

Custom Skybox: Use FabricSkyboxes or Optifine to enable a grey, overcast sky that complements the mood.
💀 For those who don’t play for beauty — but for control.
This isn't fun. It's focus. And in this world, color is a distraction.

Want more packs like this? Join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/HWWE2yKN7d)
